category_sources: source_facts.description says it displays a dependency tree of a Python distribution; official GitHub README describes pretty-printing dependency trees.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is "Johnnydep" at https://github.com/wimglenn/johnnydep.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes examples, usage, and helpful links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository https://github.com/wimglenn/johnnydep.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README examples show johnnydep resolving and printing Python package dependency trees.
source_facts.description identifies Python distribution dependency-tree output.
